## Provider

Which provider, tool, or export format should SnipContext support?

## Use case

What workflow would this unlock?

## Expected output format

Describe the structure SnipContext should generate, or link to provider docs.

## Example input

Share a small snippet or scenario that should work with this provider.

## Compatibility notes

- Authentication required:
- Local-only support possible:
- Links to provider docs:

## Additional context

Anything else maintainers should know before triaging this request.
